name: agents.handoff
description: Transfer execution to another agent. Marks the current run as handed-off and creates a new run for the target agent. Context and outputs can optionally be transferred to maintain continuity.

agent_id.description: Target agent ID to hand off to (e.g., 'compliance', 'security', 'engineering')

reason.description: Reason for the handoff (e.g., 'Requires security review', 'Compliance approval needed')

run_id.description: Current run ID to hand off from (auto-filled if in run context)

transfer_context.description: Whether to copy context (inputs, constraints, behaviors) to the new run

transfer_outputs.description: Whether to copy outputs accumulated so far to the new run

handoff_notes.description: Optional notes for the receiving agent about the handoff

new_run_id.description: Run ID created for the target agent

previous_run_id.description: Run ID that was handed off from

previous_agent_id.description: Agent ID that handed off execution

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when handoff was created
